title: Rule Engine Tests
summary: This community contains test cases for the default rule engine. It tests validations, violations, and registration of rules.

title: Discount Computation and Fulfillment
summary: Implements the discount computation logic and fulfillment workflow. It includes testing for computeDiscount and integration with promo lookup.

title: Discount and Coupon Rules
summary: Defines and tests business rules for discount eligibility, coupon stacking limits, and minimum order. These rules constrain order value and coupon usage.

title: Registerpromoserviceserver
summary: 3 symbol(s) (function) from main.go, promo.go, promo_grpc.pb.go. Primary: main.go.

title: Promo Window and Usage Rules
summary: Implements promo window and max usage rules for promotions. Validates that promotions are used within allowed windows and not exceeded.

title: Releasepromo
summary: 6 symbol(s) (function, method) from promo_test.go, rules.go, rules_engine.go. Primary: promo_test.go.

title: Promo Service Client
summary: Provides functions to register, validate, and track promo usage. It includes methods for applying promos and retrieving details.
